A raw, ultra‑realistic 8k photograph of a breathtaking Japanese idol‑style model standing in the middle of a flooded rice paddy under warm golden hour light, merging cyber‑punk sci‑fi elements with pastoral serenity. She wears a sleek white‑red varsity jacket with a relaxed fit over a sheer black mesh top that clings to her curvaceous frame, paired with high‑waist denim shorts and translucent thigh‑high stockings. Holographic neon glyphs flicker subtly among the rice stalks, while soft volumetric god‑rays cut through the air, bathing her in bright, clear illumination. Shot on a Sony A7R IV with an 85 mm f/1.4 GM lens at eye‑level, the shallow depth of field creates a creamy bokeh of warm, golden light behind her. She looks directly at the camera, tongue out in a playful tease, eyes glistening and cheeks flushed, her flawless yet realistically textured skin catching the luminous glow. The composition balances romantic passion with a futuristic vibe, delivering a crisp, high‑contrast, warm‑toned color grade that highlights her silhouette and the cyber‑punk atmosphere.8k photo, Large breasts
